---
title: "Exercises"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Exercise Sets

Each exercise set corresponds to a lecture and provides hands-on practice with the concepts covered. Both problem sets and solutions are provided.

### Exercise 1: Introduction to Health Data & R
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_01_intro.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_01_intro_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 2: Data Visualization
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_02_dataviz.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_02_dataviz_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 3: Data Wrangling
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_03_wrangling.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_03_wrangling_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 5: Linear Regression
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_05_linear_reg.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_05_linear_reg_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 6: Hypothesis Testing
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_06_hypothesis_testing.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_06_hypothesis_testing_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 7: Fixed Effects & Difference-in-Differences
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_07_fe_dd.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_07_fe_dd_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 8: Limited Dependent Variables
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_08_limited_depvars.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_08_limited_depvars_solutions.Rmd)

### Exercise 9: Machine Learning
- [Problem Set](health_analytics_09_ml.Rmd)
- [Solutions](health_analytics_09_ml_solutions.Rmd)

## How to Use These Exercises

1. Open the R Markdown file (`.Rmd`) in RStudio
2. Follow the instructions and work through each problem
3. Use the solutions to check your work or if you get stuck
4. Modify the code and experiment—this is how you learn!

## Datasets

Several CSV files are provided in the exercises directory for use in the exercises:
- `organ_donation.csv`
- `toothdecay_by_education.csv`
- `life-expectancy-vs-gdp-per-capita.csv`
- `bdiag.csv`

See individual exercises for information about which datasets are used.
